markets.no_sub_title: Wild Pitch
markets.rules_primary: If the play by play or color commentator(s) says Wild Pitch as part of USA vs Canada professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 13, 2026 at 8:00 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Video of the USA vs Canada professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 13, 2026 at 8:00 PM EDT will be primarily used to resolve the market; if a consensus by Kalshi employees cannot be reached using video, internal & external (official) transcripts of the USA vs Canada professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 13, 2026 at 8:00 PM EDT will be used.

Payout Criterion: 
The exact phrase/word, or a plural or possessive form of the phrase/word, must be used. Grammatical/tense inflections are otherwise not included. 
Commentary will count following the first pitch and end once 9th inning has concluded or the mercy rule is enacted. The mercy rule will apply if a game ends from a team leading by at least 15 runs after the fifth inning or by at least 10 runs after the seventh inning. Should the game go into extra innings, the commentary will count. Commentary will no longer count following the conclusion of the final inning, if the final play is in review commentary will end following the umpire decision.
Promotional content aired during the event will count, but advertisements will not. 
Except as otherwise specified, previously aired content, archival footage, and recordings captured at times, places, or events wholly separate from the featured address will not count.
Please see full rules for more details.

Event does not qualify:
If an event is definitively cancelled or the event fails to qualify under the Payout Criterion, or any other circumstance prevents normal resolution, then the market for "Event does not qualify" resolves to Yes and all other markets will resolve to No.  

Postponement:
If the event is postponed, and such a postponement is announced by the end of the following calendar day to be rescheduled to a time within 14 calendar days, the markets shall remain open.

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.no_sub_title: Abort / Abortion
markets.rules_primary: If Donald Trump says Abort / Abortion as part of Women's History Month Event, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Video of the Women's History Month Event will be primarily used to resolve the market; if a consensus by Kalshi employees cannot be reached using video, internal & external (official) transcripts of the Women's History Month Event will be used.

Payout Criterion: 
The exact phrase/word, or a plural or possessive form of the phrase/word, must be used. Grammatical/tense inflections are otherwise not included. - Plural nouns occurring within proper nouns and noun phrases (e.g. names, titles, etc) are included.
For the purpose of this market, the live broadcast or stream will be used to resolve this event. 
The event must be opened to the press for a live televised or streamed event to qualify.
Except as otherwise specified, previously aired content, archival footage, and recordings captured at times, places, or events wholly separate from the featured address will not count.
Please see full rules for more details.

Event does not qualify:
If an event is definitively cancelled or the event fails to qualify under the Payout Criterion, or any other circumstance prevents normal resolution, then the market for "Event does not qualify" resolves to Yes and all other markets will resolve to No.  
The event will resolve based on Donald Trump speaking in an official capacity. If Donald Trump is or is not present during a livestream, and does not speak in an official capacity the market will not qualify (e.g., inaudible private conversations on camera, unofficial statements picked up on a hot mic).

Postponement:
If the event is postponed, and such a postponement is announced by the end of the following calendar day to be rescheduled to a time within 14 calendar days, the markets shall remain open.
markets.title: What will Donald Trump say during Women's History Month Event?
markets.yes_sub_title: Abort / Abortion
